text: The agreement may be terminated by either party with 30 days' written notice.
label: STANDARD

text: The borrower shall not dispute any interest rate changes imposed by the lender.
label: RISKY
reason: Waiver of borrower's right to contest unfair terms.

text: किरायेदार मकान में कोई बदलाव नहीं करेगा बिना मालिक की लिखित अनुमति के।
label: STANDARD

text: The lender may increase the interest rate at any time without notice.
label: RISKY
reason: Unilateral interest rate hike is exploitative.

text: The employer reserves the right to terminate employment without notice for any reason.
label: UNUSUAL
reason: At-will termination is common in some countries but unusual in India.

text: The employee shall surrender all confidential documents upon termination.
label: STANDARD

text: In case of dispute, all legal proceedings must be in Hindi only.
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Restricts legal rights by imposing language conditions.

text: The company reserves the right to adjust salaries based on market conditions annually.
label: STANDARD
reason: Common adjustment clause in employment contracts.

text: The loan shall accrue interest at 18% per annum, compounded weekly.
label: RISKY
reason: Extremely high interest and compounding are predatory.

text: The property deed must be registered within 30 days of execution.
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard legal requirement for property transfers.

text: The tenant shall be responsible for maintenance of the property unless damages are due to natural disasters.
label: STANDARD

text: The borrower must provide a post-dated cheque for the entire loan amount upfront.
label: RISKY
reason: Encourages fraud and violates banking norms.

text: The employer can terminate the contract without notice for any reason.
label: RISKY
reason: No job security for the employee.

text: The landlord shall provide 30 days' notice before raising the rent.
label: STANDARD
reason: Fair notice period for rent increase as per rental laws.

text: The employer is not liable for any injuries sustained at work.
label: RISKY
reason: Exempts employer from liability for workplace injuries, which is illegal.

text: अगर संपत्ति का मूल्य घट जाए तो भी खरीदार को पूरा दाम भुगतान करना होगा।
label: RISKY
reason: One-sided clause forcing buyer to pay full amount even if value decreases.

text: प्रत्येक साल 10% ब्याज की वृद्धि कर दी जाएगी बगैर सूचना के।
label: RISKY
reason: Unilateral interest rate hike without notice—exploitative.

text: The property shall be transferred to the buyer upon full payment of ₹50,00,000.
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard property transfer clause upon full payment.
